overall.description: Game engine footage from Marvel's Spider-Man featuring Miles Morales swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan skyline before transitioning to vertical wall-running up a glass skyscraper. The clip showcases fluid aerial traversal mechanics with overcast winter lighting and dense modern architecture.

events.description: character shoots web line to swing between buildings
approaches glass building facade, preparing to transition from swinging to wall contact

agents.ego_description: swinging between skyscrapers using web-shooters, navigating through the dense urban canyon with fluid momentum

entered.detail: tall gray concrete office tower with vertical window strips
modern building with reflective glass facade
tall glass skyscraper with grid-patterned windows that will be the wall-running target
snow-covered streets visible far below between the buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a snow-covered Manhattan, following Spider-Man as he swings between towering skyscrapers. The camera maintains a dynamic third-person perspective as the character navigates the urban canyon, with concrete and glass buildings flanking both sides and snow-blanketed streets visible far below.

events.description: transitions from aerial swinging to landing on and running up the glass building wall
reflections on glass become more prominent as camera angle shifts to show sky

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the glass skyscraper facade, using spider-powers to adhere to the reflective surface while maintaining upward momentum

entered.detail: individual glass panels of the curtain wall system filling the frame
silver metal mullions dividing the glass facade into a grid pattern
horizontal louvered ventilation panels on the building exterior
reflections of clouds and adjacent buildings visible in the glass surface

segments.scene_description: The character lands on the glass skyscraper and begins running vertically up its facade. The camera follows closely, showing the grid-patterned glass panels and metal frames rushing by, with reflections of the overcast sky and distant buildings visible in the glossy surface. The perspective emphasizes the height and verticality of the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sweeping aerial traversal through a snowy urban canyon to a rapid vertical ascent up a glass skyscraper. It begins with a dynamic perspective following Spider-Man as he swings between towering buildings, with snow-blanketed streets visible far below. As the character approaches a massive structure, the momentum shifts from swinging to a direct landing on a glossy facade. The scene then transforms into a high-speed vertical climb, where the camera follows closely as grid-patterned glass panels and reflections of the overcast sky rush past. This movement emphasizes the extreme height of the environment before the character continues his ascent up the metal frames of the skyscraper.
